parameters.label: Active validator set size
parameters.developer_note: Fetch through a runtime-aware Polkadot SDK connection; the returned validator list changes by session/era.

parameters.label: Minimum active bond
parameters.developer_note: Treat as live chain state, not a constant. Exact storage item availability can vary by runtime.

parameters.label: Bonding duration
parameters.developer_note: Runtime constants can change after governance-approved runtime upgrades.

parameters.label: Slashing history depth
parameters.developer_note: Pair constants with historical event queries when building operator risk dashboards.

parameters.label: Current validator count
parameters.developer_note: Count returned validators from P-Chain RPC; optionally scope by subnetID.

parameters.label: Pending validator count
parameters.developer_note: Use to estimate near-term validator set changes and warm-up schedule.

parameters.label: Minimum validation stake
parameters.developer_note: Fetch from RPC or config docs before constructing staking transactions.

parameters.label: Minimum stake duration
parameters.developer_note: Duration constraints matter when scheduling validator add/delegator transactions.
